meaning: 斯特拉思克莱德区[英国苏格兰行政区名]
examples: Research Fellow at University of Strathclyde in 2004.
He wants Strathclyde to be the world's top energy-research hub.
James Mitchell of Strathclyde University has just completed a marathon set of interviews with SNP members.
Professor Durrani is Research Professor at the University of Strathclyde, having joined the University in 1976.
He eventually handed himself in to a magistrates court before Strathclyde Police arrested him.
